headline: Is Masco (MAS) Offering Value After Recent Pullback And Housing Sentiment Shifts
summary: This article is designed to help you assess whether Masco, at around US$59 a share, still offers value or if most of the opportunity is already reflected in the price. The stock is roughly flat over the last 3 years with a 32.6% total return. More recently it has seen a 4.3% decline over 1 year, an 8.3% decline year to date, a 7.1% decline over 30 days and a 0.6% decline over the past week. Recent news for Masco has focused on ongoing interest in the building products space, as well as...
